blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,447 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
